review_title: You Get What You Pay For… The Best Secure Storage
description: Overall it’s a 9.5/10. The 0.5 is for the issues I mentioned in the Cons but overall everything else is just so good I’ll be a customer for the foreseeable future if they can work on those issues, it would easily be a 10. They are absolutely the best secure cloud storage option available and 2nd place isn’t even anywhere close. In fact, perhaps laps behind.
author: Shane T.
pros: Literally everything. After many years of using it, I can honestly say that everything about it is great. Any time I notice anything bothering me, they usually fix or add a new feature for it within the year. You can tell the staff is urgently updating and maintaining this software. There are flaws, but they’re so minor, I barely notice it in daily use. And I use it 10-15 times a day.
cons: I also use it to store photos and videos, not just professionally. Sometimes when I am uploading photos and videos, it’ll glitch and duplicate, or freeze, or have issues finishing it and be stuck in an upload. When you close out, sometimes when you open it just resumes. Other times, it stopped and only some have uploaded. Then I have to delete what is uploaded and retry so I don’t have duplicates. I think the upload process could be much better. Also, on PC it works like optimal storages where I can open, edit, and if resumes syncing. However, on Mac, I don’t know if it’s an issue for me or for everyone, but after years and troubleshooting, it simply doesn’t sync or act like a drive in the computer itself. Therefore, to make edits, I have to download, edit, save, and upload again. This is a huge waste of time and I specifically only use my PC because of it. This support as an addition would be phenomenal, and is overdue.

review_title: Replacing Synology Drive with Tresorit
description: Moving from Synology Drive to Tresorit for document synchronisation and photo backups was easy and straight forward. However, I've only realised later, how much I am missing a functionality such as Synology Photos (previously Moments) where I can organise and visualise my backed up photos and easily share albums with others. Here, I'd love seeing Tresorit coming up with a solution that let me retrieve the photos from my backup on an external / 3PP solution such as a CMS.
author: Walter N.
pros: - Swiss based - End2End encryption - Reliable data synchronisation with good performance - Finder integration (MacOS) - Easy-to-use UI
cons: - High price - No family subscription (2 persons) which makes it even more expensive - I'd love having the possibility to visualise and organise the photo backups in a neat Webbrowser based UI, such as eg Synology Photos - No APIs (at least not in the Professional Account) that would allow me to integrate the photos with an external, web-based solution (eg. a CMS)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Be careful
description: I don’t advise Tresorit . I bought for 142 euro a subscription. I downloaded and could not get access both with my computer nor with my phone to the downloaded app. Support from Tresorit tried for 2 months to give solution, however, they did not succeed and said an update is coming soon. I ask to refund my 142 euro, they refused because money back is within 8 days, I said it never worked, they refused again to refund. I advise do not pay any amount to TRESORIT, because you don’t get refund if it is not working.
author: Jan B.
pros: What they promise easy installation and easy approch
cons: I can not open Tresorit with windows nor with iphone
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Everything in one place
description: It is easy to install on Linux, Android and Windows and I use it on all three systems concurrently. It is fast and deals smoothly with any conflicts (which are rare). I mostly use it for personal files, some business-related and some purely personal, so rarely share documents with third parties, although this is possible and straightforward to achieve. It allows me to keep important documents and records in synch between devices, both at home and when travelling abroad. Naturally, it depends on reasonable internet connections, but I cannot think of any occasion when I have been unable to access a document of which I had need at the time. I use it every day and it provides everything I need in one place.
author: Paul H.
pros: For me, its most useful feature is that I can deploy it seamlessly on various different platforms and operating systems with the added benefit of all data being encrypted on every device.
cons: I run a small business and margins are tight. I mostly use open-source software that is either free or based on a contributive model. Tresorit is relatively expensive for my actual business needs but I can also use it to provide an excellent repository for personal files as well.

review_title: Secure, reliable and easy to use
description: It's hassle free. Support service is first class - only needed it a few times but great response and service. It's easy to use and doesn't compromise on security.
author: Mark M.
pros: The software does what it promises. It's secure. You have total control over who has access to what and records to see it all too.
cons: There isn't really anything I can think of from a negative on this software. Been using it for years - our whole organisation document system is on this system - it works.

review_title: Great for keeping your files secure across different devices (GDPR compliant)
description: Great company to work with. I have only used customer support a few times, but it was always timely. It's super easy to use.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Exactly what I wanted - a safe and private online store to keep documents with customer sensitive data. I use it on my Mac and installed the app and it works seamlessly across my different devices. GDPR compliance was super important for me and that's why I opted for a paid and secure service (other than Google Drive). It's a great solution for small businesses on a budget. You can also easily configure the software and buy more disk space if needed (very inexpensive).
cons: Nothing to complain about. Would highly recommend.

review_title: A couple of years on Tresorit
description: The seamless synchronisation over a couple of workstations and tablets works great. Also the possibility of sending large files to customers in a secure way is usefull. However most of my customers have not heard of or are not using Tresorit.
author: Andy P.
pros: The straight forward interface and the assurance files are properly synchronized. In pre-Covid times we used to be on customer sites world wide. And at that point it is vital having the most recent project files at hand.
cons: The synchronisation with pictures taken on a phone. Sometimes they sync automatically , sometimes they need to be enticed to be synchronised. Not a big issue as not the main purpose of using Tresorit.

review_title: Stable and secure cloud storage
description: Positive and happy with it!
author: Maurice B.
pros: Using the software since 2018 I like the positive evolution of the product. All added functionalities were well thought and useful
cons: That some customers had problems using it and, as it seems, there might be bans in certain countries for encrypted file sharing...

review_title: Excellent software, allows for piece of mind
description: Absolutely excellent experience. Going from hard drive manual back-up to this has helped a lot, allowing me to have my files saved automatically and accessible amywhere. I have never had problems with losing work, or not finding previous versions thanks to Tresorit's many tools. Also the perfect way to share files with friends and colleagues.
author: Dario L.
pros: - Plenty of secure storage (with top-quality encryption) - Constant upload (saves your files whenever you update them), so you're sure not to lose anything - Good file recovery - Excellent for sharing large files (with both Tresorit users and non) and for sharing them securely (can require a password and such) - Extremely easy to use, with a clean user interface - Possibility to access files from mobile phone and other devices is very useful
cons: Only thing I am missing as a Premium user is the "File Request" function (to receive large files securely from others) and possibly some more control on who sees the files you share.

review_title: Tresorit is a good choice for GDPR safe cloud backup
description: Hassle-free.
author: Jens Olaf K.
pros: It's very easy to setup, can run in the background and just does what it should do: Encrypting and backing up your data in a safe place.
cons: Compared to other solutions it is a bit more expensive.

review_title: A secure service for individuals as well as business.
description: This is a very functional, secure and user friendly application. My clients do not need a tresorit account for me to send them confidential files or documents. I can work from multiple sites or multiple devices and maintain a secure data source. I can limit access to certain files or folders to different people and I get a comprehensive audit trail including deleted files.No system is perfect but Tresorit is getting close and it is being improved constantly.
author: Byron M.
pros: I handle a lot of very personal and confidential information about clients and cannot risk losing this data. I also need a service that allows me to share data and documents with clients and colleagues.Tresorit allows me to maintain a single database of active client files and to work on and share files and documenst with those clients and colleagues with absolutre security.
cons: 1 A recent cyber security audit identified a need to include 2FA when logging in to Tresorit. They considered the application deficient in our audit. 2 It is also difficult to sign out of Tresorit as there is no single log out option on main screen. If my PC is hacked then there is no barrier to entering Tresorit.3 I can't backup my PC's to Tresorit daily, i.e. use to as a back and recovery server for Windows.

review_title: Tresorit - just the tool for me
author: Ulrich K.
pros: Tresorit allows easy, seamless data flow and access from multiple devices, let's me forget about data storage and handling either for private use or research purposes, works fast and without problems in the background and guaranteed me data safety for many years so far.
cons: There is nothing what I like least about this software. As always, there are some features that others may use more frequently than I do.

review_title: Get it.
description: Tresorit is the central storage point for all my business (and private) data, especially - source codes - accounting data and tax documents providing hassle-free - secure backups - automatic sync on different workstations - an easy means of providing download links for customers (for patches, demos etc) As an additional bonus (not the main reason for use), it is convenient to access copies of all important data from all over the world (copies of passport, id, insurance and tax documents...)
author: Jens W.
pros: It is easy to use, highly performant, secure and very reliable. I am a heavy user for more than two years now and I did not experience a single critical malfunction.
cons: Well, it does not feature time-travel... what can I say? There are no shortcomings I am aware of.

review_title: Review of my interrest for Tresotit
description: I have been using this program since my former one (Wala) stopped its exploitation in 2015. I only rarely requested help from Tresorit for problems, all were solved.
author: Pierre-Alain M.
pros: The local encryption and fully encrypted storage and transfer in the cloud is the main feature I am looking for with such a program. Tresorit achieves this goal.
cons: The program is as a whole easy to handle, though some features (sync in particular) need some practice before acquiring full confidence in the safety of the process.

review_title: Used it for 2+ years happily
description: So far so good. The two glitches I've experienced I can live with. Generally, I rarely think of this software, which means that it works without issues.
author: Manos P.
pros: Cross-platform client that actually works without hiccups (macOS, Linux Mint, Windows). Almost all of its many features works as advertised. Love the selective sync feature. Automatic client updates are excellent too.
cons: File sharing is not working for me. I have not spent time on it, but colleagues told me they could not download some folders I've sent them, so I stopped using it. Renaming of bulky folders better be done through the client instead of your file manager. I've not lost files, but sometimes I had to correct for some leftovers.

review_title: Review for Tresorit
description: Very pleased.
author: Sascha M.
pros: Encryption, Performance, Ease of use, extremly reliable
cons: It takes a while to get familiar with the concept of Tresorit.

review_title: Excellent cloud storage software
description: Using tresorit i noticed it is reliable and secure cloud storage platform. The user interface makes it easy to manage files, and the end-to-end encryption scheme is highly secure. They also have a quick consumer support that will help you in any problem you encounter.
author: Ngong L.
pros: Tresorit has an end-to-end encryption, ensuring the utmost security of your data. It has a friendly user interface, ensuring that anyone can quickly and easily access and manage their files. Additionally, its cloud storage capabilities allow users to access their data from anywhere, and its strict access controls mean that you can keep your data safe at all times. Finally, Tresorit offers reliable customer support, so you can always find the help and guidance you need when you have a query.
cons: The only major con is that its relatively high cost when compared to other cloud storage solutions...

review_title: Completely satisfied
description: Everything works as expected and even more: Tresorit was selected by Swiss Postale service, what underlines it's quality.
author: Herbert L.
pros: I am a user of tresorit for as long as it exists and I am convinced about it's security and up to now, user service has been perfect.
cons: that I do not know, what I should dislike.

review_title: Very good sync program!
description: Tresorit enables us to be organized and efficient by automatically syncing our files between computers with ease. Most of the time we don't even think about it, since it runs so seamlessly.
author: Tim S.
pros: We use the KCD kitchen design program on several computers, one of which is a laptop we take out on jobs to do on-site design. Tresorit has allowed us to do this and update our files with ease on BOTH computers, so that there are no mistakes or discrepancies in files. We had previously tried SugarSync, but ran into some issues and ended up switching to Tresorit. We have had zero issues in about two years using Tresorit, and we love it!
cons: No issues to report so far with this software!

review_title: Ditched Dropbox for Tresorit and very happy
description: Easy to use, reliable, flexible. Just what's needed for this type of software.
author: Peter W.
pros: Knowing about the encryption is reassuring, but the performance of the file synchronisation is much better than Dropbox. This is really good. I have a large amount of files and Dropbox used to have problems regularly where the file synchronisation was working for hours. Tresorit does the file synchronisation as I'D expect. Also, sharing folders is easy and intuitive. The desktop app for Tresorit is really good too.
cons: When I first starting using Tresorit, the concept of a Tresor wasn't easy to grasp. But, once I got used to it, it makes so much sense and adds so much flexibility. I really like this now.

review_title: I (and my data) don't want to be the product
author: Jérémie T.
pros: The privacy put at the core of the service. Very smooth integration in computer and smartphone. The sync app works like a charm!
cons: There are not enough people using it ;-)

review_title: Safe E2E Encrypted Content Collaboration Tool
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Highly Secure, Easy to use, frequent improvements
cons: Limited amount of integration options into existing workflows and tools.

review_title: The Best Tool For Document Management
author: Finan C.
pros: I like that it offers amazing cloud storage features It comes with document management capabilities as well as file sharing
cons: Using Tresorit has been smooth and it meets our cloud storage needs. No issues.

review_title: Great interface, outstanding security
description: As mentioned in my review: 5 gb free storage, end-to-end encryption with zero-knowledge by Tresorit, great iPhone app for uploading and viewing images/photos
author: Misha K.
pros: There are multiple cloud storage solutions with different goals. For the goals of highest security (end-to-end encryption with no possibility for Tresorit or anyone else without your password to access your data) with easy/seamless access on both computer & mobile, there is no better solution that Tresorit. Features I use include: - 5 GB free for life after doing introductory tutorials/exercises - end-to-end encryption with zero knowledge by Tresorit (just be sure not to lose your password; although you can still reset password if you are logged in on one device, if you are completely logged out and forget your password, no more access to your data by design) - seamless integration with iPhone including photo thumbnails and ability to view images as they load, camera upload - iPhone app includes 4 digit PIN key lock
cons: Obviously, even more storage for free would be better, but Tresorit gives you the highest amount of free storage for an end-to-end encrypted, zero-knowledge-by-your-cloud-storage-provider solution.

review_title: A lamba user
author: Christian P.
pros: Mainly the automatic backup. Also the fcility to be sure that my data are in a safe place.
cons: I'm not shure that in case of a coding or a destroying of my files resulting of a computer attack would not be immediately converted into coded or destroyed files in your computer with as result that it would be impossible to recover my data from Tresorit.
